CHAR 8 252 New6
Revenue center file
BENE_ID BENE_ID Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15 1
CLM_ID CLM_ID Claim ID CHAR 15 2
THRU_DT CLM_THRU_DT Claim Through Date DATE 8 3
CLM_LN CLM_LINE_NUM Claim Line Number NUM 13 4
CLM_TYPE NCH_CLM_TYPE_CD NCH Claim Type Code CHAR 2 5
REV_CNTR REV_CNTR Revenue Center Code CHAR 4 6
HCPCS_CD HCPCS_CD HCFA Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) Code CHAR 5 7
MDFR_CD1 HCPCS_1ST_MDFR_CD HCPCS Initial Modifier Code CHAR 5 8
MDFR_CD2 HCPCS_2ND_MDFR_CD HCPCS Second
